# Michiel Van Herreweghe — DevOps & Software Engineer

> Belgium-based engineer building resilient pipelines, clean infrastructure,
> and software that ships. Available for roles, contracts, and project work.

## About

- Name: Michiel Van Herreweghe
- Role: DevOps & Software Engineer
- Location: Belgium
- Current employer (2026–present): Axxit (Medior Software Engineer)
- Previous employers: Tomorrowland (DevOps, 2025–2026), CloudFuel (DevOps,
  2024–2025), Inetum-RealDolmen (Junior Cloud Application & Platform Engineer,
  2023–2024)
- Education: Applied Computer Science (HoGent, 2020–2023); Information
  Management & Security (Thomas More, 2019–2020)
- Certifications: GitHub Foundations, CKAD (Certified Kubernetes Application
  Developer)

## Projects

- [`'t Vijverhof`](https://nomaddigital.dev/projects/t-vijverhof/) (2025):
  Restaurant marketing site in Erpe-Mere, Belgium. Menu, wine and dessert
  pages, photo gallery, embedded online reservation widget.
  Live: https://www.tvijverhof.be/

- [Uitvaartbegeleiding Stefaan](https://nomaddigital.dev/projects/uitvaartbegeleiding-stefaan/) (2021):
  Marketing site for a family-run funeral home in Brakel, Belgium. Covers
  every step from reporting a death to the ceremony, aula and funerarium —
  with 360° livestreaming of services. Live:
  https://www.uitvaartbegeleidingstefaan.be/

## Services

1. Infrastructure & Cloud — Provisioning and scaling cloud infrastructure as
   code. Kubernetes, Terraform, multi-cloud setups built to survive real
   traffic.
2. CI/CD & Automation — Pipelines that build, test, and deploy without drama.
   Zero-downtime releases, fully automated environments.
3. Software Engineering — Backend services and tooling written to be read.
   Clean, observable, tested. .NET and React.

## Stack

- Infrastructure: Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Ansible, Helm
- Cloud: AWS, Azure
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, ArgoCD
- Languages: .NET (C#), TypeScript / React
- Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Tempo, OpenTelemetry
- Data: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server

Site UI available in English (default), Nederlands, Français. All language
versions live at the same URL; switch via the language menu in the navigation.
